message:
chore: add ephemeral files to .gitignore; unused variable fix; new VOI/mean-field tests

.gitignore additions:
- .space_probe_bytes (agent probe file)
- storage.sqlite3 (local session database)
- *.proptest-regressions (proptest data outside proptest-regressions/)
- tests/evidence_bundle/ (test output)
- tests/edit_repro.rs (test scratch file)
- artifacts/ (build artifact directory)

agent.rs: prefix unused `tools` variable with underscore in pre-warmed branch

tests/extension_scoring_voi_meanfield.rs: 741-line integration test suite for
plan_voi_candidates() and compute_mean_field_controls() covering disabled config,
stale evidence, budget overflow, empty observations, oscillation guards, and
convergence detection (bd-3ar8v.4.51)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -25,13 +25,15 @@ tests/ext_conformance/reports/*
 !tests/ext_conformance/reports/conformance_summary.json
 !tests/ext_conformance/reports/COMPATIBILITY_SUMMARY.md
 
-# sqlite WAL/SHM artifacts
+# sqlite databases and WAL/SHM artifacts
+storage.sqlite3
 *.sqlite3-wal
 *.sqlite3-shm
 *.sqlite3-journal
 
 # Agent probe/scratch files and temp directories
 .codex_space_probe
+.space_probe_bytes
 .tmp-*/
 .tmp-*
 .tmp_*
@@ -62,6 +64,7 @@ fuzz/reports/
 
 # Proptest regression artifacts
 proptest-regressions/
+*.proptest-regressions
 
 # Recovery backup files (from crash recovery)
 *.root_full_recovery
@@ -76,6 +79,11 @@ pi-session-*.html
 
 # E2E test run results (timestamped, ephemeral)
 tests/e2e_results/
+tests/evidence_bundle/
+tests/edit_repro.rs
+
+# Build artifacts (concurrent agent output)
+artifacts/
 
 # Python bytecode caches
 __pycache__/
